prompts.title: Speed to Market Video Prompt
prompts.prompt: Create a polished 9:16 vertical (Instagram Reels) advertisement video for Nike promoting Pegasus Turbo Next. Product context: A high-performance running shoe designed for urban runners who want speed, responsive cushioning, and street-ready style. Target audience: Young urban runners and style-conscious fitness consumers. Marketing objectives: Drive launch awareness, boost product consideration, and increase online purchases. Tone: Energetic and professional. Music mood: Upbeat electronic with building energy, subtle bass drops at transitions. Typography: Modern sans-serif (Inter/Poppins), bold headlines, light body text. Color palette: #6366f1, #8b5cf6, #06b6d4, #f59e0b, #1e293b. Keep branding clear, mobile-friendly, and visually consistent. Storyboard plan: Scene 1 (5s): Close-up of a marketer's frustrated face staring at a blank design canvas, clock ticking in background. Narration: Creating ads shouldn't take forever.. Camera: Slow zoom into screen. Visual prompt cues: Photorealistic close-up of a young professional woman looking frustrated at a computer screen showing a blank design canvas, modern office, warm lighting. Scene 2 (8s): Screen recording style: user types a brief into Nike's clean UI, AI generates personas and hooks instantly. Narration: With Nike, just describe your product and watch the magic happen.. Camera: Screen capture with subtle zoom. Visual prompt cues: Modern web application interface showing AI generating marketing content, clean UI with cards appearing, purple and blue color scheme, product name Nike. Scene 3 (10s): Split screen showing 3 different ad variants being generated simultaneously, progress bars filling up. Narration: Personas, hooks, scripts, and storyboards — all generated in seconds.. Camera: Dynamic split screen with animations. Visual prompt cues: Split screen showing three different advertisement variants being created simultaneously, modern flat design, vibrant colors. Scene 4 (7s): Happy marketer presenting results on a big screen to impressed colleagues, Nike logo visible. Narration: From brief to campaign-ready in under 5 minutes. That's Nike.. Camera: Wide shot pulling back to reveal team, end on logo. Visual prompt cues: Professional team in modern office looking impressed at a large screen showing advertisement results, Nike logo on screen, celebratory atmosphere. End with this CTA: Try Nike Free Today — No credit card required. Keep pacing smooth, transitions intentional, characters consistent across scenes, and text readable. Follow these brand guidelines: Bold, kinetic, premium, aspirational, black-white-orange palette. Do not mention these competitors: Adidas, New Balance.
shot_plan: 00s-05s: Close-up of a marketer's frustrated face staring at a blank design canvas, clock ticking in background | Camera: Slow zoom into screen | On-screen text: We've all been here.

05s-13s: Screen recording style: user types a brief into Nike's clean UI, AI generates personas and hooks instantly | Camera: Screen capture with subtle zoom | On-screen text: AI-Powered Campaign Generation
13s-23s: Split screen showing 3 different ad variants being generated simultaneously, progress bars filling up | Camera: Dynamic split screen with animations | On-screen text: 3 Complete Ad Variants

23s-30s: Happy marketer presenting results on a big screen to impressed colleagues, Nike logo visible | Camera: Wide shot pulling back to reveal team, end on logo | On-screen text: Try Nike Free Today

prompts.title: Founder's Toolkit Video Prompt
prompts.prompt: Create a polished 9:16 vertical (Instagram Reels) advertisement video for Nike promoting Pegasus Turbo Next. Product context: A high-performance running shoe designed for urban runners who want speed, responsive cushioning, and street-ready style. Target audience: Young urban runners and style-conscious fitness consumers. Marketing objectives: Drive launch awareness, boost product consideration, and increase online purchases. Tone: Bold and inspiring. Music mood: Upbeat electronic with building energy, subtle bass drops at transitions. Typography: Modern sans-serif (Inter/Poppins), bold headlines, light body text. Color palette: #6366f1, #8b5cf6, #06b6d4, #f59e0b, #1e293b. Keep branding clear, mobile-friendly, and visually consistent. Storyboard plan: Scene 1 (5s): Startup founder working late, surrounded by sticky notes and rejected ad mockups. Narration: Building a startup is hard enough. Making ads shouldn't be.. Camera: Handheld, intimate close-up. Visual prompt cues: Young entrepreneur working late at night in a startup office, surrounded by sticky notes and printed ad mockups, laptop glowing, moody lighting. Scene 2 (8s): Founder opens Nike, types product description, AI generates complete campaign strategy. Narration: Nike turns your product vision into a complete ad campaign — powered by AI.. Camera: Over-the-shoulder screen capture. Visual prompt cues: Over-the-shoulder view of a founder using Nike platform on laptop, AI generating campaign content on screen, modern minimalist workspace. Scene 3 (10s): Montage of generated ads appearing across different platforms — Instagram, YouTube, Facebook. Narration: Professional ads for every platform. Multiple variants. Zero design skills needed.. Camera: Quick cuts between platforms. Visual prompt cues: Montage showing advertisements displayed across Instagram phone mockup, YouTube player, and Facebook feed, professional quality, diverse ad formats. Scene 4 (7s): Confident founder at a pitch meeting, showing ad campaign results, Nike logo reveal. Narration: Launch faster. Spend smarter. Win bigger. Nike.. Camera: Cinematic wide shot, logo fade-in. Visual prompt cues: Confident startup founder presenting impressive ad campaign metrics at a board meeting, modern glass conference room, Nike logo on presentation screen. End with this CTA: Launch Your First Campaign — Start Free. Keep pacing smooth, transitions intentional, characters consistent across scenes, and text readable. Follow these brand guidelines: Bold, kinetic, premium, aspirational, black-white-orange palette. Do not mention these competitors: Adidas, New Balance.
shot_plan: 00s-05s: Startup founder working late, surrounded by sticky notes and rejected ad mockups | Camera: Handheld, intimate close-up | On-screen text: $10,000+ for an agency?
05s-13s: Founder opens Nike, types product description, AI generates complete campaign strategy | Camera: Over-the-shoulder screen capture | On-screen text: AI Does The Heavy Lifting
13s-23s: Montage of generated ads appearing across different platforms — Instagram, YouTube, Facebook | Camera: Quick cuts between platforms | On-screen text: Every Platform. Every Format.
23s-30s: Confident founder at a pitch meeting, showing ad campaign results, Nike logo reveal | Camera: Cinematic wide shot, logo fade-in | On-screen text: Launch Your First Campaign
